general.title: Quantity calculator
general.description: Per-product configuration for the quantity calculator

detail.intro: Turns a customer's need (area, length or consumption) into the required order quantity right on the product detail page. The minimum, step and maximum come from the product's native purchase settings.
detail.enabledHelp: Shows the calculator for this product in the storefront.
detail.factorHelp: How much of the customer input one sales unit covers. Example: one box of flooring covers 2.5 m² → enter 2.5. Required quantity = ceil(need / this value).
detail.factorWarning: Without a value greater than 0 the calculator is not shown in the storefront.
detail.inputUnitHelp: Shown next to the input. Leave empty to use the fallback unit from the plugin settings.
detail.helpTextLabel: Help text shown to the customer
detail.helpTextHelp: Optional sentence shown above the input field.
